api: Marketo REST API (tenant-specific identity host, https://developers.marketo.com/rest-api/)
scope: wave1 migration: the 3 legacy-parity read streams only (leads, programs, activities); Marketo's write/lead-database-bulk-import surface is out of scope for this read-only migration, matching legacy's own read-only Write stub

excluded.reason: write/upsert surface; legacy is read-only, no write parity to migrate
not implemented as a stream because it introduces an additional resource family or request shape outside this connector's current sync scope
